stemHtml: You are performing an IFR flight and are about to transmit a compulsory report when you hear a PAN PAN message. Which of the following answers are correct?

options.a: Urgency message has lower priority than your message.
options.b: Urgency message has higher priority than your message.
options.c: Urgency message has higher priority than all messages.
options.d: Urgency message has higher priority than a distress message.
